sp_widget.name: IncentNow Create Plan
sp_widget.template:
{{c.data.planactiontitle}}

Build a comprehensive incentive plan with earning and commission rules

!

Plan Incomplete

  • Add at least one earning rule to define data sources
  • Add at least one data gathering step
  • Add at least one Payout Summary

About Earning Rules

Earning rules define what data to pull from your backend systems to calculate commissions. You can specify the source object (like Opportunities or Orders), the field to measure (like ARR or Amount), how to aggregate the data, and filter conditions to include only relevant records.

Example: "Sum ARR from Opportunities where Stage = 'Closed Won' AND Close_Date is in current quarter"
